title: 品牌徽标设计图
description: A photorealistic amateur photograph of a custom building block set resting on a light wood grain table in a living room. In the background stands a large product box with a red logo reading "{argument name="brand name" d
prompt_raw: A photorealistic amateur photograph of a custom building block set resting on a light wood grain table in a living room. In the background stands a large product box with a red logo reading "{argument name="brand name" default="BRICKLY"} BUILDING SETS". The box features text reading "8+", "540 PCS", "5 FIGURES", and the main large title "{argument name="set title" default="WATTERSON FAMILY HOUSE"}". A red circular badge on the box reads "CUSTOM SET FAN DESIGN", and the box art depicts the house and characters under a blue sky. In the foreground sits the fully assembled block model of a {argument name="house color" default="blue"} two-story suburban house with a brown roof, white porch, red steps, a white picket fence, and a blocky green tree. To the left of the house is a built block model of a {argument name="car color" default="pink"} station wagon. Standing in a row in front of the house are exactly 5 custom block minifigures: a blue cat in tan pants, an orange fish with legs, a tall pink rabbit in a white shirt and tie, a blue cat in a white shirt, and a small pink rabbit in an orange dress. The background is a slightly blurred living room with a grey sofa and white blinds.

prompt_display_cn:
案例「{argument name=」属于品牌视觉。这是一张品牌视觉/Logo 规范类案例，重点在标志、字体、色彩、图标系统、应用物料和品牌气质的统一呈现。适合改成品牌提案板、Logo 组合规范、视觉识别系统、产品品牌页。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A 照片写实 amateur photograph of a custom building block set resting on a 光线 wood grain table in a living room. In the 背景 stands a large 商品 box with a red 标志 reading "【brand name：BRICKLY】 BUILDING SETS". The box features text reading "8+", "540 PCS", "5 FIGURES", and the main large 标题 "【set 标题：WATTERSON FAMILY HOUSE】". A red circular badge on the box reads "CUSTOM SET FAN DESIGN", and the box art depicts the house and 角色s under a blue sky. In the foreground sits the fully assembled block model of a 【house color：blue】 two-story suburban house with a brown roof, white porch, red steps, a white picket fence, and a blocky green tree. To the left of the house is a built block model of a 【car color：pink】 station wagon. Standing in a row in front of the house are exactly 5 custom block minifigures: a blue cat in tan pants, an orange fish with legs, a tall pink rabbit in a white shirt and tie, a blue cat in a white shirt, and a small pink rabbit in an orange dress. The 背景 is a s光线ly blurred living
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【品牌名称】的品牌视觉规范展示板。

品牌定位：
品牌属于【行业/领域】，核心气质是【品牌气质】，目标用户为【目标用户】。

Logo 区域：
展示主 Logo、反白 Logo、横版/竖版组合、图形标识和安全留白规范。Logo 文字为【Logo文字】。

色彩与字体：
展示品牌主色【主色】、辅助色【辅助色】、背景色【背景色】，并展示中文/英文字体规范：【字体风格】。

图标与视觉元素：
设计一组统一风格的品牌图标，用于【应用场景】。加入品牌纹理、辅助图形或视觉符号：【辅助元素】。

应用展示：
展示【应用物料1】、【应用物料2】、【应用物料3】等真实落地场景，例如 App 图标、网页、手机界面、名片、包装、杯子或海报。

整体要求：
版式高级、干净、有品牌提案感，文字清晰，像专业设计公司出品的视觉规范板。
